uplink.description: Measurements: temperature, relative humidity and CO2 (climate + air-quality)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (OpCode 3, mask=0x13 temp|rh|co2). Expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (keyword mode) on this input: voltage 3.30 V, temp 23.4 C, rh 55 %, CO2 800 ppm.

uplink.description: Measurements: full block (temp, rh, pressure, light, CO2, TVOC)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (OpCode 3, mask=0x3F temp|rh|press|light|co2|tvoc). Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js: voltage 4.56 V, temp 21.0 C, rh 48 %, pressure 1013.2 hPa, light 350 lx, CO2 612 ppm, TVOC 125 ppb (TVOC has no vocabulary key -> extra).
Synthetic in-bounds payload (OpCode 3, mask=0x01 temp only). raw 0xFFCC = -52 tenths. Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js: voltage 3.00 V, temp -5.2 C.

uplink.description: Measurements: temp + CO2 with extended digital inputs and particulate matter
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload (OpCode 3, mask=0x91 temp|co2|extended; ext=0x03 dinputs|PM). Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js: temp 22.0 C, CO2 700 ppm, dinputs {1:true,2:false}, PM1.0/2.5/10 = 5/10/15 ug/m3 (dinputs, PM and TVOC have no vocabulary keys -> camelCase extras).
Synthetic in-bounds payload (OpCode 0 Heartbeat). Expected from reference/upstream-codec.js: voltage 4.56 V, no measurement block.
Synthetic. Upstream reports decode error 0 (Empty) for a zero-length payload.

uplink.description: Error: measurements OpCode without a measurement bitmask
uplink._note: Synthetic. OpCode 3 with no body. Upstream reports decode error 80 (Measurements/Thresholds requires Measurements).
Synthetic. mask requests temperature but only one of two bytes is present. Upstream reports decode error 90 (measurements without (complete) Temperature value).
